tagline: ACE-Step music generation — GPU container for Aura
description:
ACE-Step v1 3.5B is a diffusion-based music generator with optional
lyrics conditioning. Produces high-quality full-length tracks in
seconds on a modern GPU.
notes: All advanced controls are now wired. bpm and keyscale are appended to the caption text (the pipeline has no dedicated kwargs but the upstream LM reads tempo and key cues from captions); infer_method maps onto the pipeline's `scheduler_type` argument via {ode→euler, sde→sde}. instrumental, reference_audio, audio_cover_strength, and seed remain wired as before (reference_audio routes to `ref_audio_input` with `audio2audio_enable=True`; audio_cover_strength routes to `ref_audio_strength`; instrumental forces empty lyrics). The XL variant (Batch 4) will expose bpm/keyscale as real `GenerationParams` fields.
Requires GPU (~4 GB VRAM minimum, 8 GB recommended).

Uses the shared GPU base block (FROM nvidia/cuda + apt + torch stack) — see models/_shared/base-gpu.dockerfile.snippet for the byte-identical prefix ACE-Step and Chatterbox share for Docker layer deduplication.
Source code pinned to commit 1bee4c9f5b43e30995f8d4d33b3919197ce1bd68 via `pip install git+https://`.
huggingface_hub pinned to pre-1.0 (0.36.2) to satisfy ACE-Step's transitive `transformers<1.0` cap — see docs/VERSION_POLICY.md "Exception process".
Weights split across 5 build layers (6.3 GB main transformer, 1.1 GB umt5-base, 299 MB DCAE, 197 MB vocoder, 16 MB configs) so that large-file pulls are resumable per Stage 13A.

torchvision is re-installed with --force-reinstall --no-deps AFTER the ACE-Step pip install, because ACE-Step's dependency tree silently overrides our cu128 torchvision wheel with the CPU version — the repair pin keeps the matched cu128 trio.
torchaudio.save is monkey-patched in inference.py to use soundfile instead of torchcodec (torchaudio 2.11+ defaults to torchcodec which requires FFmpeg shared libs the image doesn't carry).

Chatterbox's pre-SSOT pin `chatterbox-tts==0.1.7` has a hard torch<=2.6.0 cap that causes its image to downgrade off the shared cu128 trio at build time. That's a Chatterbox-side quirk; ACE-Step stays on 2.11.0+cu128.

strategies.label: Refine
strategies.instruction: You are a music prompt expert for ACE-Step music generation. The user has typed a rough music idea. Rewrite it completely as comma-separated style tags. Fix any typos in the original intent. Do NOT keep the original text. Do NOT use labels like 'genre:' or 'mood:'. Output ONLY comma-separated tags describing: music style, mood, instruments, tempo feel, and vocal style if needed. Example input: 'happy bollywood song'. Example output: 'bollywood, pop, upbeat, festive, tabla, sitar, piano, strings, energetic, bright female vocals, 120 BPM feel'. Keep under 80 words.
